S-01.notes: Two-column dense field layout via inline grid; submit-on-Enter wired on primary CTA; keyboard shortcuts panel surfaced; help-aside suppressed per dense+speed-leaning composition.

S-02.notes: Receipt-style with a dense 4-column attribute grid mirroring §7 FileLog shape (attribute-list slot, per receipt composition-rules) plus a first-5 line-item table (line-items slot); deep-linkable reference; print-friendly chrome; persistent success banner per GR-14 (acknowledgement, not toast). The architect's 'confirmation-receipt over detail-page' note describes the conceptual layering of FileLog inspection beneath the receipt headline, not a nested detail-page composition.

S-03.notes: Compact table with bulk-select column and inline-edit cells (effectively editable variant via inline-edit composition); 10 columns visible to honour D3=+2; keyboard shortcuts panel + Ctrl+Enter retry + Ctrl+D download; filter chrome collapsed by default to keep error grid above the fold.
